channel.title: GTD 2026 — Scaled Teams of 2 Female/Female
channel.description: Score updates for Scaled Teams of 2 Female/Female — German Throwdown 2026

item.title: 4 new, 15 updated scores — 2026-07-11 20:04 UTC
